10.response: {"Q0":"The instruction comprehension questions were terrible due to having to repeat it all after getting one wrong. I got 2 wrong at first and you can't expect people to memorise it all perfectly when the instructions took forever. It wasn't even complicated anyway, it's something you will understand after a few practice trials."}

6.response: {"Q0":"I accidentally collected 1 but I wasn't trying to"}

11.response: {"Q0":"Maybe memorisation and keeping focus and seeing what percentages/money people prefer"}

13.response: {"Q0":"This study was extremely long the questions at the end are excessive"}

0.response: {"Q0":"I tried to choose a mixture of percentage and reward when deciding between those parts of teh study. so if there was a 80% chance of £1 and a 20% chance of£7 I would choose the 7, but if there was a 80% chance of £3 I would choose that instead. When I started getting green gems I decided not to harvest them because in one of hte practices it gave me tons of rocks but then I realised after that I should have done that in the main trial on that one part I stopped collecting."}

7.response: {"Q0":"At first I ddin't collect them because of in the trial them not giving me many coloured gems, but then I realised in the main trial that it was always worth collecting them."}

9.response: {"Q0":"Selecting the best monetary reward between the two options"}
